description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with a single sloped shed roof extending over the main living area. The structure is rectangular with clean, sharp lines and a flat, expansive roof that overhangs one side, providing partial shade and architectural interest. A staircase is visible on one side, suggesting access to a rooftop terrace or a split-level entry. The exterior walls are smooth and likely finished in a light-colored material, contrasting with the darker roof. There is a large cutout or skylight in the roof, allowing natural light into the interior. The building sits on a flat base, with no visible porch or decorative elements, emphasizing its contemporary style.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a sloped shed roof, smooth light walls, and a prominent staircase leading to a rooftop opening. The design is minimalist and geometric, with a large roof overhang.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sloped roof, staircase leading up, and a large roof overhang with a visible skylight cutout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the sloped roof and the staircase at the far end, with minimal wall detail.
description_view_2: Rear view with the roof's slope visible and a mostly solid wall, minimal architectural features apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the underside of the roof overhang and the staircase, with the skylight cutout visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: minimal, with a large roof skylight and few visible wall windows
